metadata.description: BL4 Database: Characters, Weapons, and Gadgets

parts.name: comp 05 legendary 01
parts.description: Legendary rarity component for Forge Master

parts.name: Age of Ice
parts.description: Amon deals increased Damage to Frozen enemies and Bosses.

parts.name: Armor of Contempt
parts.description: Amon gains Overshield when he deals Action Skill Damage.

parts.name: Ballistic Bulwark
parts.description: Amon gains Overshield when he deals Ordnance Damage.

parts.name: Battleborn
parts.description: Amon gains increased Gun Damage the more Full his Health. This effect is Doubled while Amon is at Maximum Health.

parts.name: Bellows
parts.description: Whenever Amon Activates his Forgeskill, he gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration.

parts.name: Berserk
parts.description: Whenever Amon activates his Forgeskill, he becomes Berserk for a Duration, gaining Slow Immunity, and Bonus Cryo Damage with Gun Damage and Melee Damage.

parts.name: Blackout
parts.description: Ordnance Damage has a Chance to Critically Hit, and Shock enemies when they do.

parts.name: Blast Furnace
parts.description: Whenever Amon or his Forgedrones Critically Hit an enemy or cause a Detonation, he gains increased Damage Dealt for a Duration. Detonations grant multiple Stacks.

parts.name: Bloodlust
parts.description: Whenever Amon's Shield Breaks, he gains Bloodlust for a Duration, gaining increased Reload Speed and Lifesteal. Bloodlust is also activated on Action Skill Activation.

parts.name: Bolt Action
parts.description: Whenever Amon Reloads, his Guns gain Bonus Shock Damage for a Duration.

parts.name: Brimming Vigor
parts.description: Amon gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and deals increased Melee Damage the more full his Health.

parts.name: Bullet Hail
parts.description: Amon's Gun Shots have a Chance to Ricochet as an Elemental Shard, dealing Cryo Damage.

parts.name: Bullet Storm
parts.description: Whenever Amon applies a Status Effect, he gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Burning Rage
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Incendiary Damage will grant a Stack of Flame Affinity for a Duration. Flame Affinity Stacks grant increased Reload Speed and Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Burning Ramparts
parts.description: Amon gains increased Fire Rate and Status Effect Chance the more full his Shields.

parts.name: Cacophony
parts.description: Amon gains increased Ordnance Damage and Detonation Radius.

parts.name: Caroming Shard
parts.description: Elemental Shard has a Chance to Ricochet.

parts.name: Cast Iron
parts.description: Amon gains increased Forgeskill Cooldown Rate and Gun Handling.

parts.name: Catastrophe
parts.description: Whenever Amon applies Shock to an enemy, he gains increased Critical Hit Chance for a Duration. Whenever Amon applies Burning to an enemy, he gains increased Critical Hit Damage for a Duration. Both effects stack separately.

parts.name: Cooling Mantle
parts.description: Kill Skill. Partially Restore Worldbreaker's Cooldown.

parts.name: Crackling Aegis
parts.description: Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Ordnance Damage based on his Shields. The fuller his Shield, the greater the effect.

parts.name: Destruction Engine
parts.description: Amon gains increased Forgeskill Damage and Detonation Damage.

parts.name: Disco Infernus
parts.description: Whenever Amon applies Burning to an enemy, he gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Discombobulate
parts.description: Amon gains Melee Critical Hit Chance.

parts.name: Dragon's Breath
parts.description: Whenever Amon Activates his Ordnance, his next Gun Shot is converted to Incendiary Damage, Staggering damaged enemies, and gaining increased Damage Dealt. Bosses cannot be Staggered, and Badasses have a chance to be Staggered.

parts.name: Electrical Fire
parts.description: Whenever Amon Burns an enemy, he also Shocks them. Whenever Amon Shocks an enemy, he also Burns them.

parts.name: Endless Bombardment
parts.description: Grenades have a Chance to refund themselves on use. Heavy Ordnance have a Chance to refund 1 Ammo on damaging enemies.

parts.name: Escalation
parts.description: Forgedrones gain increased Attack Speed and Movement Speed.

parts.name: Eternal
parts.description: Amon gains increased Action Skill Duration and Gun Swap Speed.

parts.name: Executioner
parts.description: Amon gains increased Critical Hit Damage. The effect is Doubled for a Duration after dealing Melee Damage.

parts.name: Fists of Stone
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Melee Damage, Restore a percentage of Forgeskill Cooldown. Melee Attacks Double this effect.

parts.name: Forged In Steel
parts.description: Amon becomes immune to all Damage for a brief Duration whenever he activates a Forgeskill.

parts.name: Freezer Burn
parts.description: Dealing Incendiary Damage with Guns increases Cryo Damage for a Duration. Dealing Cryo Damage with Guns increases Incendiary Damage for a Duration.

parts.name: Gathering Storm
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon deals increased Elemental Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: get the Lead Out
parts.description: Amon gains increased Reload Speed. The effect is Doubled for a Duration after causing a Detonation.

parts.name: Gut Punch
parts.description: Melee Damage and Ordnance Damage have a chance to apply Weakness to enemies for a Duration. Weakened enemies deal reduced Damage, and take increased Damage. Weakness is affected by Status Effect Duration, and is itself considered a Status Effect.

parts.name: Harbinger
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon gains increased Melee Damage and Maximum Shield Capacity for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Heavy Plate
parts.description: Amon gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and Maximum Overshield Capacity.

parts.name: High Voltage
parts.description: Elemental Bolts now Stagger enemies, and consume an additional Stack of Shock Affinity to Multiply Damage Dealt. Bosses cannot be Staggered, and Badasses have a reduced Chance to be Staggered.

parts.name: Honed Point
parts.description: Forgedrones have a Chance to Critically Hit. Whenever a Forgedrone Critically Hits, they partially restore Amon's Action Skill Cooldown.

parts.name: Icy Rage
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Cryo Damage will grant a Stack of Cryo Affinity for a Duration. Cryo Affinity Stacks grant increased Gun Damage.

parts.name: Impetus
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon gains increased Shield Regeneration Rate and Movement Speed for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Into the Fray
parts.description: Amon gains increased Damage Dealt and Damage Reduction based on his distance from the enemy. The closer the enemy, the greater the bonus.

parts.name: Judgment
parts.description: Amon deals increased Melee Damage to enemies below 50% total HP.

parts.name: Lightning Rod
parts.description: Amon's Gun Shots have a Chance on Critical Hit to spawn an Elemental Bolt, dealing Shock Damage.

parts.name: Machinist
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon Restores a percentage of Ordnance Cooldown.

parts.name: Maiming Strike
parts.description: Gun Critical Hits have a chance to apply Weakness to enemies for a Duration. Weakened enemies deal reduced Damage, and take increased Damage. Weakness is affected by Status Effect Duration, and is itself considered a Status Effect.

parts.name: Masterwork
parts.description: Forgedrones gain increased Damage and Duration.

parts.name: Metal Urge
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Gun Damage, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Mortal Flare
parts.description: Whenever Amon kills a Weakened enemy, they Detonate, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage to nearby enemies.

parts.name: My Touch Is Death
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Melee Damage, there is a chance to Activate Kill Skills.

parts.name: Northern Wind
parts.description: Amon's Gun Critical Hits have a Chance to apply additional Slow to enemies, as if dealt Cryo Damage. Chance is Doubled while his Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Ordained Hammer
parts.description: Hammer Forgedrones now deal Ordnance Damage in addition to their other types and gain a Chance to cause a Detonation on damaging enemies, dealing Cryo Damage in an area.

parts.name: Permafrost
parts.description: Whenever Amon Freezes an enemy, Cryo Hazard is created under them, dealing Cryo Damage for a Duration.

parts.name: Primal Surge
parts.description: Whenever Amon applies a Status Effect to an enemy, there is a Chance to partially restore his Shield and Ammo.

parts.name: Raging Inferno
parts.description: Action Skill Damage has a Chance to Critically Hit and Burn enemies when it does.

parts.name: Reactive Armor
parts.description: Detonations partially Restore Amon's Shield and Ordnance Cooldown.

parts.name: Rearm
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Damage with a Melee Attack, his current Gun has its Ammo partially refilled.

parts.name: Reverse Explosion
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Forgeskill Damage, he creates a Drone Singularity for a Duration.

parts.name: Rimebreak
parts.description: Whenever Amon's Shield Breaks, he partially Restores Shield and Detonates, dealing Cryo Damage to all nearby enemies and Freezing them.

parts.name: Scar Tissue
parts.description: Amon gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and Repkit Healing.

parts.name: Scorched Kairos
parts.description: Amon gains increased Ordnance Damage and Magazine Size.

parts.name: Smelter
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon Restores a percentage of Forgeskill Cooldown.

parts.name: Stoked
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, he gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Strike the Anvil
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Action Skill Damage, he consumes a Stack of Shock Affinity to cause an Elemental Bolt to strike that enemy, dealing Shock Damage.

parts.name: Tactician
parts.description: While Hipfiring, Amon gains increased Fire Rate, but decreased Gun Handling. While Aiming, Amon gains increased Gun Damage and Gun Handling.

parts.name: Tail of the Comet
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, there is a Chance to apply a Cryo Status Effect that deals Cryo Damage over time for a Duration. Tail of the Comet is affected by Status Effect Application Chance.

parts.name: Tempered Ice
parts.description: Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Ordnance, he spawns a Hammer Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Cryo Melee Damage.

parts.name: Tempered Lightning
parts.description: Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Action Skill, he spawns a Sword Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Shock Melee Damage. Activating an Action Skill while Tempered Lightning is active will partially Restore the Duration of all active Forgedrones.

parts.name: Tempered Pyre
parts.description: Forgedrone Skill. Whenever Amon activates his Forgeskill, he spawns an Axe Forgedrone that attacks nearby enemies for a Duration, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage. Activating a Forgeskill while Tempered Pyre is active fully Restores the Duration of all active Forgedrones.

parts.name: The Best Defense
parts.description: Amon gains Overshield whenever he deals Melee Damage.

parts.name: The Thrill (Amon)
parts.description: Amon gains Missing Health Regeneration. Every time Amon takes or absorbs Non-Status Effect Damage, he gains a Stack of Resolute for a Duration, which increases this effect.

parts.name: There Is Only Red
parts.description: Kill Skill. Whenever Amon kills an enemy while Berserk is active, partially restore Berserk's Duration, and increase Bonus Cryo Damage from Berserk.

parts.name: Thunderous Rage
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Shock Damage will grant a Stack of Shock Affinity for a Duration. Shock Affinity Stacks grant increased Critical Hit Damage.

parts.name: Tritanium Knuckles
parts.description: Amon gains increased Melee Damage and Skill Damage.

parts.name: Twin Tempers
parts.description: Tempered Pyre now spawns an additional Axe Forgedrone that deals Cryo Melee Damage. Forgedrones from Tempered Pyre have reduced Duration.

parts.name: Vital Organs
parts.description: Kill Skill. Amon gains Critical Hit Chance with Guns for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Warrior's Cup
parts.description: Whenever Amon uses a Repkit while his Action Skill is active, partially restore Action Skill Duration.

parts.name: Wield the Storm
parts.description: Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Status Effect Duration.

parts.name: Wildfire
parts.description: Amon gains increased Ricochet Damage, Burning Damage, and Burning Duration.

parts.name: Wildheart
parts.description: Amon gains increased Status Effect Damage and Hazard Damage.

parts.name: Winter's Kiss
parts.description: Whenever Amon deals Ordnance Damage, he consumes a Stack of Cryo Affinity for each nearby enemy to spawn an Elemental Shard, dealing Cryo Damage in an area.

parts.name: Worldbreaker
parts.description: Whenever Amon Ground Slams, he consumes all Flame Affinity Stacks to create a Flame Fissure in front of him, dealing Incendiary Melee Damage to all enemies hit. Worldbreaker deals Bonus Damage for each Stack of Flame Affinity consumed.

parts.name: Wrath of Nature
parts.description: Amon gains increased Status Effect Application Chance and Cryo Effectiveness. This effect is Doubled when his Action Skill is active.

parts.name: comp 05 legendary 06
parts.description: Legendary rarity component for Bio Robot

parts.name: Absolute Zero
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she receives a Stack of Zero Point. For every Stack of Zero Point, her Action Skill Duration freezes enemies for a short time.

parts.name: Accretion
parts.description: Harlowe and her allies gain Lifesteal against Entangled enemies.

parts.name: Action at a Distance
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, she gains a chance to apply that Status Effect to each Entangled enemy.

parts.name: Alternative Fuel Source
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe activates CHROMA Accelerator, drain her Shield and Amp her next Unstable Energy Pocket.

parts.name: Annihilation
parts.description: Harlowe's Flux Generator occasionally throws Grenades. If Harlowe or her Allies are inside the Flux Generator and have a Grenade equipped, it throws a copy of that Grenade.

parts.name: Blue Shift
parts.description: While her Action Skill is Cooling Down, Harlowe deals Bonus Cryo Damage with her Melee Attacks. While her Action Skill is Active, Harlowe deals Bonus Radiation Damage with her Melee Attacks.

parts.name: Break the Ice
parts.description: Convert all CHROMA Accelerator Damage to Cryo Damage.

parts.name: Bright Future
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe triggers or retriggers an Action Skill, she gains increased Fire Rate.

parts.name: Carry the One
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains a chance to Entangle another nearby enemy.

parts.name: Chain Reactor
parts.description: Harlowe deals Bonus Radiation Damage to Entangled enemies.

parts.name: Cold Welding
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Freezes an Entangled enemy, it deals Cryo Damage to itself and all other Entangled enemies.

parts.name: Concurrence
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Duration for every Entangled enemy.

parts.name: Confirmative Reality
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe shoots an Entangled enemy, she and all allies restore a portion of their Action Skill Cooldown.

parts.name: Control Group
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy restores a portion of Harlowe's Action Skill Cooldown and Action Skill Duration.

parts.name: Core Sample
parts.description: Harlowe gains Lifesteal against Frozen enemies. If she's at full Health, she gains Overshield instead.

parts.name: Creative Overflow
parts.description: Harlowe deals increased Gun Damage based on her Overshield. The more Overshield she has, the bigger the bonus.

parts.name: Critical Funding
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, she gains a chance to Entangle it, and Refills a portion of her Gun's Magazine.

parts.name: Decoherence
parts.description: Harlowe deals increased Damage with all sources to Entangled enemies. Enemies inside of her Flux Generator take further increased Damage.

parts.name: Dirty Bomb
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Irradiates an enemy, create a Radiation Explosion on that enemy.

parts.name: Distribution Function
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe's Action Skill damages an enemy, restore a portion of her and all allies' Shield Capacity. If their Shields are full, gain Overshield instead.

parts.name: Domino Effect
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe deals Splash Damage to an Entangled enemy, she gains a chance to trigger Entangled Damage Share again.

parts.name: Elementary
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Elemental Damage and Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Elephant's Foot
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe's Shield breaks, she deals Radiation Damage to all Entangled enemies. Harlowe gains Overshield equal to the amount of Damage dealt this way.

parts.name: Endothermic Reaction
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, create an Endothermic Aura that deals constant Cryo Damage to enemies around it. Harlowe's Endothermic Aura deals increased Damage based on her Overshield. The more full, the greater the bonus

parts.name: Eureka!
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe enters Fight For Your Life, she throws a free Unstable Energy Pocket at a nearby enemy - if there are any.

parts.name: Excited State
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Critical Hit Damage. Whenever an enemy is damaged by Harlowe's Action Skill, the next shot on that enemy will be an Automatic Critical Hit.

parts.name: Experimentation
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy causes an Elemental Explosion on all other Entangled enemies.

parts.name: Exposed Core
parts.description: While her Shield is down, Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance.

parts.name: Feedback Loop
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Damage, Action Skill Duration, and Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Field-Ready Prototype
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Damage.

parts.name: Fissile Launcher
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe damages an Irradiated enemy or an Entangled enemy, shoot a Radiation Dart at another enemy.

parts.name: Flash Freeze
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe deals Cryo Damage with an Action Skill, she gains a chance to Freeze that enemy.

parts.name: Force Of Will
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, Daze that enemy. Dazed enemies have decreased Movement Speed and Attack Speed. Daze can stack.

parts.name: Freeze Frame
parts.description: Harlowe's Guns deal Bonus Cryo Damage for every enemy she has in Stasis. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Fuzzy Math
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance.

parts.name: Gamma Ray Burst
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe retriggers her Action Skill, the next shot fired from her Gun drains her Shield and deals Bonus Radiation Damage based on the amount drained.

parts.name: Get up and Go
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe activates or retriggers an Action Skill, she gains increased Movement Speed.

parts.name: Glow Up
parts.description: Harlowe gains Critical Hit Chance with Guns against Irradiated enemies.

parts.name: Gordian Knot
parts.description: Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an Entangled enemy, she gains a chance to instantly fully restore her Action Skill.

parts.name: Great Red DoT
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Duration.

parts.name: Harlowe's Certainty Principle
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Gun Handling, which is further increased with every enemy in her Flux Generator.

parts.name: Heat Sink
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Highly Efficient
parts.description: Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an enemy with a Skill, Restore a portion of her Shield Capacity.

parts.name: Jaunt
parts.description: Press and hold Melee Attack to make Harlowe swap places with her Flux Generator.

parts.name: Keep Ice On That
parts.description: All Cryo Damage Harlowe deals gains Lifesteal. If Harlowe's Health is full, she gains Overshield instead.

parts.name: Latent Charge
parts.description: Harlowe deals Bonus Damage with Guns, Melee Attacks, and Action Skills while she has Overshield. The more Overshield she has, the bigger the bonus.

parts.name: Mains Hum
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and increased Maximum Overshield Capacity.

parts.name: Make Extraordinary
parts.description: Harlowe gains Critical Hit Chance with all Skills. This chance increases every time Harlowe Entangles an enemy. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Mass Function
parts.description: Harlowe and her allies gain increased Reload Speed for every Entangled enemy.

parts.name: Mechanical Brilliance
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe damages an enemy with a Skill, she gains increased Skill Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: MeltDown
parts.description: Harlowe's Critical Hits with Guns deal Bonus Radiation Damage.

parts.name: Momentum
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she and her allies deal increased Critical Hit Damage.

parts.name: Negative Entropy
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Gun Handling. This bonus is Doubled while an enemy is in Stasis.

parts.name: Neutron Decay
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Irradiates an enemy, she gains increased Gun Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Opposing Force
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Freezes an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown rate. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Parallel Circuit
parts.description: After triggering or retriggering an Action Skill, Harlowe gains increased Gun Damage.

parts.name: Pencils Down
parts.description: While Harlowe's Action Skill is Cooling Down, she grants herself and her allies increased Reload Speed and Fire Rate.

parts.name: Periodic Table Flip
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Elemental Damage, Status Effect Application Chance, and Cryo Effectiveness.

parts.name: Personal Observation
parts.description: Harlowe deals increased Melee Damage and her Melee Attacks gain a chance to Entangle enemies.

parts.name: Poisoned Sun
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Radiation Damage and Irradiation Chance.

parts.name: PPE
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Maximum Shield Capacity and Shield Recharge Rate.

parts.name: Precision Engineering
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased critical hit damage.

parts.name: Pulse Drive
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: QED
parts.description: Melee Override. Harlowe attaches an Unstable Energy Pocket to her fist, and slams it into an enemy in front of her.

parts.name: Quantum Immortality
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Entangles an enemy, she gains Health Regeneration.

parts.name: Refraction
parts.description: Harlowe and her allies gain Ricochet Chance against Entangled enemies. Critical Hits Double this chance. Ricochets have Reduced Damage.

parts.name: Resonance Cascade
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe deals Radiation Damage to an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Ripple Effect
parts.description: Kill Skill. Whenever Harlowe kills an Entangled enemy, automatically Entangle another nearby enemy.

parts.name: Rounding Up
parts.description: For every enemy her Action Skill damages, Harlowe gains increased Gun Damage when her Action Skill ends. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Runaway Reaction
parts.description: Harlowe gains increased Status Effect Chance. Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, it becomes Entangled.

parts.name: Slingshot
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Dazes an enemy, she also Entangles them, and then she gains increased Movement Speed.

parts.name: Stun Lock
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe Critically Hits an enemy, she briefly puts that enemy into Stasis. This form of Stasis lasts for a short duration, or until the enemy is shot again.

parts.name: Sustained Reaction
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an Entangled enemy restores a portion of Harlowe's Action Skill Duration.

parts.name: Test Subjects
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe applies a Status Effect to an enemy, she gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Too Coolant For Schoolant
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe deals Cryo Damage, gain increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Triple Point
parts.description: Whenever Harlowe deals non-Cryo Damage to an Entangled enemy, she deals Bonus Cryo Damage to that enemy. If she deals Cryo Damage to an Entangled enemy, she deals increased bonus Damage.

parts.name: Unstable Ice-otope
parts.description: Kill Skill. Harlowe deals Bonus Cryo Damage with all sources.

parts.name: Wasted
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an Irradiated enemy or killing an enemy with Radiation Damage leaves behind a Radiation Hazard.

parts.name: Abajo
parts.description: Whenever Rafa throws a Grenade, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Al Centro
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Handling and Action Skill Handling while Overdrive is active. The longer Overdrive has been active, the greater the bonus.

parts.name: Arriba
parts.description: Kill Skill. Whenever Rafa kills an enemy, he gains increased Ordnance Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Artilleria
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Ordnance Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Asymmetric Warfare
parts.description: Indirect Projectiles gain increased Damage. Indirect Projectiles include all Action Skill Weapons, Thrown Guns, and Projectiles not fired from your Gun.

parts.name: Awe
parts.description: Whenever Rafa Shocks an enemy, all shots fired at that enemy are Critical Hits.

parts.name: Barrage
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Splash Damage while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Blowout
parts.description: Whenever Rafa applies a Mark or Critically Hits an enemy with his Action Skill, they explode in Corrosive Lobbed Projectiles. The longer Rafa's Action Skill has been active, the more Corrosive Projectiles are spawned.

parts.name: Booming Business
parts.description: Whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy, he gains a chance to spawn a Free Grenade. If Rafa has a Grenade equipped, spawn a Grenade based on that.

parts.name: Brain Dump
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains Critical Hit Chance with his Guns while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Collaborative Ignition
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa deals Bonus Damage with Skills and Ordnances in the Element of his current Gun while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Concentrated Build Up
parts.description: While Aiming with a Gun, Rafa deals Bonus Shock Damage. Each time Rafa hits an enemy this way, deal increased Bonus Damage until he zooms out. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Conductivo
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Status Effect Chance, and also gains further increased Shock Chance.

parts.name: Confeti
parts.description: Rafa's Ordnances deal Bonus Damage in his current Gun's Element.

parts.name: Cruel Accrual
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Skill Damage with all Skills. The longer his Action Skill has been active, the greater the bonus. This effect can stack.

parts.name: CYA
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy restores Shields based on Rafa's Maximum Health Capacity.

parts.name: Deadline
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Fire Rate and increased Reload Speed while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Debtonation
parts.description: Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with an Action Skill, place a Remote Detonator on that enemy. Remote Detonators gain increased Damage and increased Splash Radius for every Remote Detonator on an enemy. Remote Detonators automatically explode after a delay or whenever the enemy they're attached to dies. Ordnance Override. Detonate all Remote Detonators.

parts.name: Deft Hands
parts.description: Rafa and his Peacebreaker Cannons gain increased Fire Rate.

parts.name: Devil-May-Care
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. While Overdrive is active, Rafa gains increased Movement Speed, and gains Health Regeneration. While Overdrive is not active, Rafa takes increased Damage, and gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate.

parts.name: Dial In
parts.description: Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with a Melee Attack, his Melee Attacks gain Critical Hit Chance. This chance stacks, and all Stacks are removed whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy.

parts.name: Diamond Hands
parts.description: Dealing Melee Damage grants Rafa a Stack of Diamond Hands. Gain increased Gun Damage for every Stack of Diamond Hands. Once Rafa deals Gun Damage, Stacks begin to decay quickly until they run out.

parts.name: Drone Assault
parts.description: Whenever Rafa triggers or retriggers an Action Skill, send one of his STRM Gliders at an enemy in his view. Once it arrives, it explodes in a Corrosive Explosion equal to its remaining health.

parts.name: Drone Defense
parts.description: Whenever Rafa activates an Ordnance, spawn STRM Gliders that hover near him. As he takes Damage, transfer some of it to his STRM Gliders. Once a STRM Glider receives too much Damage, it explodes, dealing Corrosive Splash Damage to nearby enemies.

parts.name: El Alacran
parts.description: Enemies damaged by Rafa's Peacebreaker Cannons have increased Status Effect Chance.

parts.name: El Borracho
parts.description: Rafa deals increased Corrosive Damage while his Action Skill is active. The longer it has been active, the greater the bonus. This effect can stack.

parts.name: El Catrin
parts.description: Whenever Rafa Slides, his Action Skill deals Bonus Shock Damage, and he also deals increased Critical Hit Damage.

parts.name: El Corazon
parts.description: A portion of Rafa's Maximum Health Capacity is converted into Maximum Shield Capacity.

parts.name: El Diablito
parts.description: A portion of all Incendiary Damage Rafa deals also deals Bonus Incendiary Ordnance Damage.

parts.name: El Paraguas
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Splash Damage and Critical Hit Chance.

parts.name: El Soldado
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Damage while Overdrive is active. This bonus is doubled while Rafa is charging APOPHIS Lance.

parts.name: El Valiente
parts.description: Rafa deals increased damage from all sources. The fuller Rafa's Shields are, the greater the bonus. While Rafa's Shields are at Maximum Capacity, double the bonus.

parts.name: Empuje
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Action Skill Duration.

parts.name: Errant Spark
parts.description: All Indirect Projectiles deal Bonus Incendiary Damage. If the Indirect Projectile already deals Incendiary Damage, double the Bonus Damage.

parts.name: Expedite
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Overdrive grants Rafa increased Movement Speed.

parts.name: Field Repairs
parts.description: Whenever Rafa activates an Action Skill, he restores a portion of his Maximum Shield Capacity. If his Shields are already full, he gains Overshield instead.

parts.name: Fiesta
parts.description: Whenever Rafa applies a Status Effect, his Action Skills consume no Duration, and APOPHIS Lance consumes no Charges.

parts.name: First Impression
parts.description: The first shot fired from a fully-loaded Magazine gains increased Damage.

parts.name: Handshake Deal
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Gun Damage and Melee Damage

parts.name: Hard Sell
parts.description: Whenever Rafa's Shields break, he instantly gains a portion of his Shield Maximum Capacity as Overshield. This Skill cannot be used again until Rafa next activates his Action Skill.

parts.name: Hemolitions
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. While Overdrive is active, Rafa may use Grenades during Ordnance Cooldown at the cost of Health. Every time a Grenade is used this way, it costs more Health until Rafa's Grenade fully cools down.

parts.name: In The Zone
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy freezes Overdrive's Duration.

parts.name: Inspirado
parts.description: Whenever Rafa inflicts a Status Effect on an enemy, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate and improved Action Skill Duration Rate. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Jaque
parts.description: Whenever Rafa damages an enemy with a Skill, he gains a Stack of Jaque. For every Stack of Jaque, he gains increased Overdrive Bonuses. Whenever Overdrive ends, he loses all Stacks.

parts.name: Juerga
parts.description: Whenever Rafa Critically Hits an enemy, Action Skill Duration is restored.

parts.name: La Garza
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Handling and Action Skill Handling while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Las Jaras
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa Regenerates Ammo while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Lateral Plinking
parts.description: Rafa's Indirect Projectiles gain a chance to Ricochet.

parts.name: Liquidation
parts.description: Marked enemies killed by Rafa leave behind a Corrosive Hazard.

parts.name: Mate
parts.description: When Overdrive ends, convert all Jaque Stacks into Mate Stacks. Gain increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate for every Stack of Mate. Once Rafa's Action Skill is readied, lose all Stacks of Mate.

parts.name: Metal Management
parts.description: Whenever Rafa activates or retriggers an Action Skill, his gun consumes no Ammo.

parts.name: Midnight Oil
parts.description: Rafa's Action Skills deal Bonus Corrosive Damage. The longer the Skill has been active, the greater the Bonus Damage.

parts.name: Motivar
parts.description: Pressing Action Skill during Arc-Knives grants increased Overdrive Duration. This bonus is reset whenever Rafa activates an Action Skill.

parts.name: Pa' Dentro
parts.description: Activating an Action Skill grants Rafa Health Regeneration.

parts.name: Pain Reaction
parts.description: Rafa's Guns gain a chance to Ricochet off of enemies with Status Effects. Ricochet Damage is based on the Damage Dealt.

parts.name: Per My Last
parts.description: Whenever Rafa deals Damage with an Action Skill to an enemy, he gains a chance to deal that Damage again.

parts.name: Preparado
parts.description: Whenever Rafa Reloads his current Gun, he gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Proprietary Incendiary
parts.description: Melee Override. Press ability to lob a STRM Glider at an enemy. Once it reaches its targets, it explodes and deals Incendiary Damage in an area based on the amount of Ammo in Rafa's Gun when he threw the STRM Glider.

parts.name: Protecto-Pulse
parts.description: Pressing ability while Arc-Knives are active or Rafa retriggers his Action Skill drains a portion of Rafa's Shields, and deals that much Shock Damage to nearby enemies.

parts.name: Resiliencia
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Damage Reduction while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Rolling Stone
parts.description: While moving, shots have a chance to Ricochet off of Rafa. This chance is doubled while Sliding.

parts.name: Saldar
parts.description: Rafa's Melee Critical Hits gain Lifesteal.

parts.name: Shield Barriest
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Shield Recharge Rate and improved Shield Regen Delay while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: Shock Market
parts.description: Whenever Rafa deals Splash Damage, deal Bonus Shock Damage based on the Damage Dealt.

parts.name: Sinergia
parts.description: Whenever Rafa deals Ordnance Damage, he also deals increased Gun Damage and Melee Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Soltado
parts.description: Kill Skill. Double all Overdrive bonuses.

parts.name: Sustainable Energy
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains Health Regeneration based on how much Overdrive time is remaining.

parts.name: Temerario
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Gun Damage, but decreased Gun Handling. These Effects are based on how long Overdrive has been active.

parts.name: The Right Tools
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Ordnance Damage after Reloading his Gun. This bonus stacks.

parts.name: The Thrill (Rafa)
parts.description: Overdrive Skill. Rafa gains increased Fire Rate, which is increased even further while Overdrive is active.

parts.name: To the Last
parts.description: Rafa gains increased Gun Damage and Skill Damage. The lower his Health, the greater the bonuses.

parts.name: Venganza
parts.description: Whenever Rafa's Shields break after being fully recharged, spawn a free Grenade. If he has a Grenade equipped, use that Grenade instead.

parts.name: Vitriol
parts.description: The first shot fired from Rafa's fully-loaded Magazine deals Bonus Corrosive Damage.

parts.description: Legendary rarity component for Undead Eye

parts.description: Legendary rarity component for Kindread Spirits

parts.description: Legendary rarity component for Teen Witch

parts.name: A Deeper Grave
parts.description: Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Duration.

parts.name: Ancient Rites
parts.description: Vex gains a stack of Ancient Rites for each of her active Minion(s) every second, increasing Minion Damage. Stacks are lost after a Duration with no active Minion.

parts.name: Blast Rites
parts.description: Whenever Vex uses an Ordnance, she gains Overshield, and also gains increased Fire Rate for a Duration.

parts.name: Blasted Fiends
parts.description: Vex gains increased Ordnance Damage. A perfect of Vex's Ordnance Damage increases Minion Damage.

parts.name: Blight Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Kill Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Corrosive, killing an enemy creates a Haunting Remnant Minion for a Duration that seeks our nearby enemies, dealing Corrosive Status Effect Damage over time. Kill Skill. Restore Haunting Remnant's Duration, if active.

parts.name: Blood is Magic
parts.description: Vex deals increased Action Skill Damage the higher her Health.

parts.name: Blood Is Power
parts.description: Vex gains Bonus Kinetic Damage with Guns based on her current Lifesteal when her Health is full.

parts.name: Blood Sacrifice
parts.description: Activate Kill Skills whenever Vex's Minion(s) die.

parts.name: Blood shot
parts.description: When Vex uses a Repkit, her next Gun Shot will become a Blood Shot, converting Damage Dealt into Kinetic Damage and dealing Bonus Damage based on her current Health.

parts.name: Bloodletter
parts.description: Gun and Skill Critical Hits have a chance to apply Bleed, causing Kinetic Status Effect Damage over time for a Duration. Bleed is affected by Status Effect Application Chance, and is itself considered a Status Effect. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Burning Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Incendiary, Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Critical Hit Damage and Status Effect Application Chance. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

parts.name: Burnt Offering
parts.description: Vex gains increased Incendiary Damage and Incendiary Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Channeling
parts.description: Vex gains increased Action Skill Duration and Attunement Duration.

parts.name: Claw and Bang
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Melee Damage and Ordnance Damage.

parts.name: Cold Iron
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Gun Damage.

parts.name: Conjunction
parts.description: Vex gains increased Gun Damage the more full her Shield and gains Damage Reduction the less full her Health.

parts.name: Corporeal
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Maximum Overshield Capacity and Overshield Duration. While Vex has Overshield, she and her Minion(s) gain increased Damage Dealt.

parts.name: Cursed Blade
parts.description: Vex's Melee Attacks apply Curse to hit enemies, making them take Kinetic Status Effect Damage any time they take Gun Damage.

parts.name: Deadwire
parts.description: When Vex deals Gun Damage, there is a Chance to spawn a Spark Remnant that will seek out a nearby enemy and explode, dealing Shock Minion Damage to other nearby enemies.

parts.name: Death Follows Closer
parts.description: Whenever Vex takes Damage while at Low Health, Spawn a Reaper nearby.

parts.name: Diener
parts.description: Dead Ringer gains an additional Charge.

parts.name: Dreadlight
parts.description: When Vex deals Gun Damage, there is a chance to spawn a Radioactive Hazard, dealing Radiation Damage over time.

parts.name: Drink Full
parts.description: Whenever Vex deals Gun Damage, she gains a Stack of Drink Full, increasing her Fire Rate. Stacks of Drink Full are lost if a new Stack has not been gained for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Elemental Essence
parts.description: Vex gains increased Elemental Damage. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Enchantment
parts.description: Vex gains Bonus Kinetic Damage with Guns while her Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Essence Leech
parts.description: Vex gains Lifesteal. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Extra Cursed
parts.description: Curse Damage now triggers on Minion Melee Damage, and deals increased Damage when it's triggered by a Critical Hit.

parts.name: Fell Inscriptions
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Melee Damage and Maximum Health Capacity.

parts.name: Fiendish Invigoration
parts.description: When Vex uses a Repkit, she and her Minion(s) gain increased Movement Speed and Fire Rate for a Duration.

parts.name: Full Moon
parts.description: Vex gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate and Ordnance Cooldown Rate based on the fullness of her Shield.

parts.name: Ghasterbait
parts.description: Whenever Vex Dodges, she creates a Specter nearby and becomes Invisible for a Duration, or until her next Gun Shot.

parts.name: Grave Assault
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Fire Rate for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Command
parts.description: Kill Skill. Restore a percentage of Trouble's Command Skill Cooldown and Respawn Cooldown.

parts.name: Grave Current
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex's Minion(s) gain Bonus Shock Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Elements
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and Minion(s) gain Elemental Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Fiends
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) deal increased Damage. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Implements
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Gun Damage for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Power
parts.description: Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Max Stacks.

parts.name: Grave Quickening
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Action Skill Cooldown Rate. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Sights
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Critical Hit Damage and Gun Handling. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Sustenance
parts.description: Kill Skill. Restore a percentage of Action Skill Duration.

parts.name: Grave Thirst
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain Lifesteal for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Grave Vitality
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex gains increased Maximum Health Capacity and Health Regeneration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Haruspex
parts.description: Melee Override. Vex now throws a Phase Dagger from her offhand that deals Melee Damage to enemies hit. Phase Daggers can Critically Hit. Kill Skill. Haruspex's Cooldown is reset.

parts.name: Hasty Fiends
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Movement Speed and Damage Reduction.

parts.name: Havoc
parts.description: Vex gains increased Radiation Damage and Radiation Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Icy Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Kill Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Cryo, killing an enemy restore Ammo and Ordnance Cooldown. Effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

parts.name: Idle Hands
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain Reload Speed based on the fullness of her Health.

parts.name: Infernal Sum
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) deal increased Critical Hit Damage to enemies who have less than a set percentage of their Health.

parts.name: Infusion
parts.description: When Vex uses a Repkit, she and her Minion(s) gain Bonus Damage with Guns and Melee Damage for a Duration. The Bonus Damage's Elemental Type is based on Vex's currently-equipped Attunement.

parts.name: Keen Fiends
parts.description: Minion Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.

parts.name: Keen Mind
parts.description: Vex's Skill Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.

parts.name: Keen Suffering
parts.description: Status Effect Damage gains a chance to Critically Hit.

parts.name: Leeching Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Kinetic, she gains Lifesteal and increased Reload Speed. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

parts.name: Material Components
parts.description: Vex gains increased Kinetic Damage and Kinetic Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Mortal Terror
parts.description: Chance to Activate Kill Skills when Critically Hitting enemies.

parts.name: Mourning
parts.description: Vex's Kill Skills gain increased Effectiveness.

parts.name: Necrosis
parts.description: Vex gains increased Corrosive Damage and Corrosive Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Obedient Fiends
parts.description: Vex gains increased Minion Damage. Minion Skills and Command Skills gain further increased Damage.

parts.name: Overheal
parts.description: While Vex has Overshield, she and her Minion(s) gain Health Regeneration.

parts.name: Overprotective
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain Overshield.

parts.name: Overspirited
parts.description: Kill Skill. Killing an enemy with Ordnance Damage or an Action Skill will spawn an Explosive Remnant that deals Cryo Ordnance Damage to nearby enemies. Explosive Remnant gains increased Damage based on Overkill Damage.

parts.name: Phase Pocket
parts.description: Vex gains increased Magazine Size and Gun Switch Speed. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Pincushion
parts.description: Haruspex now throws multiple Phase Daggers from both hands in a fan pattern. Killing an enemy now only refunds a portion of Haruspex's Cooldown.

parts.name: Portents of Suffering
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Prismatic Ichor
parts.description: When Vex or her Minion(s) apply a Status Effect, apply another random Elemental Status Effect.

parts.name: Prismatic Weaponry
parts.description: Vex and her Specters deal Bonus Damage with Gun Critical Hits. The Bonus Damage will be a random Elemental Type that changes on Reload, and that is increased for each active Attunement.

parts.name: Radiant Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Radiation, she gains increased Splash Damage and Maximum Shield Capacity. These effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

parts.name: Reawakening
parts.description: Whenever Vex or her Minion(s) Critically Hit, there is a chance to restore Action Skill Cooldown.

parts.name: Recurrence
parts.description: Whenever Vex deals Gun Damage or Melee Damage, gain a Stack of Recurrence, which increases her and her Minions' Gun Damage and Melee Damage. Stacks of Recurrence are lost if a new Stack has not been gained for a Duration. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Restorative Tonic
parts.description: When Vex uses a Repkit, she gains increased Shield Regeneration for a Duration.

parts.name: Reverburnations
parts.description: Melee Damage dealt by Vex or her Minion(s) has a chance to deal Incendiary Melee Damage.

parts.name: sacrificial essence
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) gain increased Damage Dealt, but Vex also gains increased Damage Taken for a Duration. Stacks are lost when Vex Dodges or enters Fight For Your Life. This effect can stack.

parts.name: Sanguine Fiends
parts.description: Kill Skill. Vex and her Minion(s) restore Health.

parts.name: Shiver
parts.description: Vex gains increased Cryo Damage and Cryo Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Shocking Attunement
parts.description: Attunement Skill. While Vex is Attuned to Shock, she gains increased Movement Speed and Gun Damage while moving. Effects persist for a Duration after Attunement is switched.

parts.name: Shot to Go!
parts.description: When Vex swaps her current Gun, her new Gun has its Ammo partially Refilled.

parts.name: Spirit Bomb
parts.description: Reapers gain Maximum Health Capacity and will release a Spirit Bomb Remnant when they die, dealing Damage of their Elemental Type to nearby enemies.

parts.name: Stormblessed
parts.description: Vex gains increased Shock Damage and Shock Status Effect Damage.

parts.name: Strike Me Down
parts.description: Whenever Vex would enter Fight For Your Life, she immediately gets a Second Wind, becomes Invisible for a Duration, and causes a Phase Explosion.

parts.name: Tail Whip
parts.description: Trouble gains the ability to Tail Whip, dealing damage in an area over 2 hits.

parts.name: Target Prescience
parts.description: Vex's Gun Damage gains Critical Hit Chance against any part of enemies.

parts.name: Volatile Essence
parts.description: Vex gains increased Splash Damage. Double this effect when an Action Skill is active.

parts.name: Vorpal Fiends
parts.description: Vex and her Minion(s) gain Critical Hit Damage.

parts.name: Yowl and Bay
parts.description: Vex's Minion(s) gain increased Maximum Health Capacity. Vex gains increased Gun Damage for a Duration after Commanding Trouble.
